name: Curl Command Import

statusDetails.message: expected response to have status code 202 but got 200
statusDetails.trace:

   at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:8)

descriptionHtml:
Generated from cURL: curl --location 'https://restful-booker.herokuapp.com/booking' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data '{
"firstname": "Lakshmi",
"lastname": "Shanmugam",
"totalprice": 1111,
"depositpaid": true,
"bookingdates": {
"checkin": "2018-01-01",
"checkout": "2019-01-01"
},
"additionalneeds": "Breakfast"
}'
